status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

Thanks a lot Michael.

I have freed up space on that build node. There was a problem caused by some reconfiguration a few weeks ago which resulted in disk space not being managed properly. This shouldn't be an issue going forward.

I've re-triggered the review build, you can monitor it at http://build.lab.whamcloud.com:8080/job/lustre-reviews/385/

+ echo '**** GENERATING kernel ABI metadata ****'
**** GENERATING kernel ABI metadata ****
+ gzip -c9

gzip: stdout: No space left on device
error: Bad exit status from /var/tmp/rpm-tmp.8711 (%build)

http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/381/

Could please anyone can help out the over space issue?

Many thanks, Michael, I'll re-commit patch.

The infra_lab job checks for changes to the lab repo every 15 minutes. If there's an update, it builds a new cookbooks.tar.gz and kicks off the infra_chef-solo job across all the builders. Currently, the infra_chef-solo job is waiting for a lustre-master build to complete.

I've committed a fix for this in the toolkit cookbook. The repo file's permissions will be 0644 for build nodes now.

Will something trigger this change on the build nodes or should I go manually change the build nodes? No problem to do it manually. pdsh for the win.
I've committed a fix for this in the toolkit cookbook. The repo file's permissions will be 0644 for build nodes now.

Hi, Brian,
I would like you help me deal with this issue. Anyway, I don't know anything for Jenkins. Even haven't a account for lab access yet. So I am very appreciated if you can fixed this issue or tell me who i should consulting. Thanks in advance.

Yes, indeed. And I would guesstimate that it's the permissions of the toolkit yum repo configuration file:

$ pdsh -g type=builders -S ls -l /etc/yum.repos.d/toolkit.repo
rhel5-32-build: -rw------- 1 root root 176 Apr 12 11:23 /etc/yum.repos.d/toolkit.repo
rhel5-64-build: -rw------- 1 root root 178 Apr 12 10:57 /etc/yum.repos.d/toolkit.repo
rhel6-32-build: -rw------- 1 root root 176 Apr 12 11:24 /etc/yum.repos.d/toolkit.repo
rhel6-64-build: -rw------- 1 root root 178 Apr 12 11:40 /etc/yum.repos.d/toolkit.repo

which causes:

$ yumdownloader --destdir /var/lib/jenkins/lbuild-data/kernelrpm/2.6.18/rhel5/i686/yumR20774 kernel-devel-2.6.18-238.9.1.el5
Loaded plugins: fastestmirror
Config Error: Error accessing file for config file://///etc/yum.repos.d/toolkit.repo

I wonder if those really need to be 600.
